issue_snippets.description: Using xml.etree.ElementTree.parse to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace xml.etree.ElementTree.parse with its defusedxml equivalent function or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called
issue_snippets.tool_snippet:
12 def parse_xml(path: str) -> ET.ElementTree:
13     tree = ET.parse(path)
14     root = tree.getroot()
issue_snippets.context:
11: 
    12: def parse_xml(path: str) -> ET.ElementTree:
>>  13:     tree = ET.parse(path)
    14:     root = tree.getroot()
    15:     db_connection = root.findtext(".//db_connection")
